comment: MCP server registry for Speedrungg. None enabled by default — user opts in. Each entry documents what the server provides and security posture. Run .claude/hooks/pre-install-audit.sh before enabling.

phaser-editor.comment: Phaser MCP server (Jan 2026, official) — direct integration with Phaser Editor v5
phaser-editor.audit: Verify package signature matches @phaserjs scope before enabling

playwright.comment: Browser automation for QA verification — used by qa-tester agent for screenshot proofs

github.comment: GitHub integration for issue-driven workflows + repo management
github.envHint: Requires GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN with repo scope; never commit token
github.audit: Anthropic / MCP reference servers; trust level high

sentry.comment: Error tracking integration — used by analytics-engineer for production triage

clickup.comment: ClickUp task management — used by project-manager for backlog/sprint sync
clickup.envHint: Requires CLICKUP_API_TOKEN + CLICKUP_TEAM_ID; rotate tokens monthly
clickup.audit: Third-party MCP server. Verify package source before enabling. Pin version. Run pre-install-audit. Alternative: write your own minimal MCP client against ClickUp API v2 if security posture matters more than convenience.

obsidian.comment: Obsidian vault integration — used by writer, game-designer, research-analyst for design docs and zettelkasten-style notes
useFor: linking design decisions to research notes
obsidian.envHint: Use the official MCP filesystem server pointed at your Obsidian vault. Read-only mode recommended; don't let the agent edit your vault directly without clear scope.
alternativeServers: @takuya0301/mcp-obsidian (uses Obsidian's Local REST API plugin; bidirectional)
obsidian.audit: Filesystem MCP is Anthropic-reference. Third-party Obsidian-specific servers vary in quality; vet carefully.

notion.comment: Notion integration — alternative to Obsidian for users who live in Notion. Used by project-manager + research-analyst
notion.envHint: Requires Notion integration token; share specific pages/databases, not entire workspace

figma.comment: Figma integration — used by ux-designer, art-director for design-to-code workflows
figma.audit: Multiple Figma MCP options exist; pick based on needs (design tokens vs full file access)

policy.preInstallAudit: Always run .claude/hooks/pre-install-audit.sh before enabling a new server
policy.versionPinning: Pin to specific versions in production; never @latest for security-sensitive servers
policy.permissions: Each enabled server requires explicit user approval via /mcp command
policy.supplyChainNote: 655 malicious skills found in early 2026. Treat MCP servers with same caution: vet, audit, pin, monitor.
tokenManagement: Store all tokens in .env or system keychain — NEVER commit
Revoke tokens immediately if a teammate leaves or device is compromised

configurationGuide.step1_choose: Pick which integrations matter to you. Don't enable everything — each adds attack surface.
configurationGuide.step2_install: npx the package directly first; verify it runs. Then add to settings.json mcpServers.
configurationGuide.step4_test: Use /mcp command in Claude Code to verify connection
configurationGuide.step5_document: Add to your project's onboarding doc which MCP servers are required
